1876230.name: Beneath & Beyond
1876230.description:
Make your own unique character’s build:

Do you want to be a warrior with a two-handed sword and cast fireballs? You are welcome!
Learn magic spell from the School of The Lightning and use a bow - not a single bandit will withstand an arrow with an electric charge

Develop magic skills as you want:

Attack enemies from a distance or enchant your weapon to cause additional magic damage

Find an especial way to defeat enemies:

Each enemy has their own weakness and vulnerability, exploit it

Different locations and biomes: from swamps to palace rooms:

Each level has unique room disposition so a player won't be able to remember where to find loot and enemies. This feature increases replayability by times

Loot an equipment from enemies and chests:

Use an equipment of defeated enemies while going through the dungeon

Riddles and puzzles:

Every level has a puzzle that leads to secret chambers and corridors which brings game experience to a new level
1876230.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 简体中文, 俄语, 土耳其语
